compiled_state.title: Add approach_viability_concern orchestrator reading and mid-resolution check to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add approach_viability_concern handling to plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md:

1. ORCHESTRATOR READING: After Step 4a (ESCALATE_REVIEW dispatch) and before resolution loop entry, read approach_viability_concern from reviewer-findings.json. If true, log the signal for potential routing to implementation-plan.

2. MID-RESOLUTION HANDLING (DD3): If approach_viability_concern is detected DURING the resolution loop (emitted by a re-review), the orchestrator completes the current resolution attempt, then checks the signal BEFORE dispatching the next attempt. If true: log 'approach_viability_concern detected mid-resolution — completing current attempt then routing to implementation-plan' and exit the resolution loop. The orchestrator can then route to implementation-plan re-invocation.

3. ROUTING: The orchestrator reads the signal and surfaces it. The actual routing to implementation-plan depends on the calling orchestrator (sprint, commit workflow). REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md documents the signal reading and mid-resolution check; the calling workflow decides how to act on it.

4. Note: Story 4 (8019-90b5) also modifies the resolution loop. This story adds a mid-loop check AFTER the ratchet state update from Story 4 — the check fires after ratchet evaluation, before the next resolution attempt dispatch.

Unit test exemption: Orchestrator workflow prompt — no executable code.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] approach_viability_concern reading documented
  Verify: grep -q 'approach_viability_concern' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Mid-resolution check documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'mid-resolution.*viability\|viability.*mid-resolution\|completes.*current.*attempt.*then.*check' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md read in full. Step 4a (ESCALATE_REVIEW) is at line ~366-559. Autonomous Resolution Loop starts at line ~698. Two insertion points identified: (1) after Step 4a.5 (merge escalated severities) before Step 4b, and (2) within the resolution loop after ratchet state update. ✓

Both acceptance criteria pass: grep finds 'approach_viability_concern' and 'approach_viability_concern detected mid-resolution'. ✓
